title: Camping Lantern Rechargeable,Led Camping Lanterns Lights Lamp,5000mAh Battery Emergency Light for Power Outages,3 Colors,IPX4 Waterproof Camping Lamp for Outdoor, Fishing, Hiking,1 Pack
features: 🔋5000mAh Rechargeable Battery Lanterns&Power Bank Design: This LED Camping Lanterns built-in the large 5000mAh lithium battery, providing up to 6 hours of illumination time in the brightest mode when fully charged. Additionally, the rechargeable camping lantern also functions as a power bank for smartphones or tablets through the output port.

💡Super Bright Camping Lantern: With a 360-degree glow of up to 1000 lumens, this lantern illuminates your space effectively. The translucent reflector cover allows maximum light transmission, providing ample brightness for home power outages, emergencies, or outdoor use.
🌈3 Colors and Dimmable: Short press the button to select the desired light mode: cool white, warm white, or natural white. Press and hold the button for smooth, stepless dimming.

💧IPX4 Water Resistant: With IPX4 waterproof protection, our flashlight lantern is designed to withstand water splashes. Crafted with anti-slip rubber and shockproof materials, it boasts high strength to endure rainy weather and rugged outdoor conditions.

💯Removable Lampshade/Base: This camping lantern can be placed on a table as a reading light or inverted as a tent light. It can also be used as a flashlight. Please note that after removing the lampshade, the light will be brighter! It is a perfect emergency tool for camping, hiking, fishing, and other outdoor activities.

😊🌿【Warranty Guarantee】Our rechargeable camping lanterns are more environmentally friendly compared to traditional battery-powered lights. If you encounter any issues or are unsatisfied with your LED Camping Lanterns, please don't hesitate to contact us. We promise to respond within 12 hours, ensuring you receive a satisfactory resolution to your concerns.
